description:
The RawImage component takes in a ITexture2D and takes in parameters to alter this texture image.

}}

fields.Material: The material to use as the texture from.
fields.Tint: The tint color for this raw image.
fields.UVRect: Shifts the UV of the raw image.
fields.Orientation: Rotates the raw image and respects aspect ratio.
fields.PreserveAspect: If this raw graphic should preserve its aspect ratio.
fields.InteractionTarget: Makes this image as the interaction target for this UIX.

usage: This component acts more like a holder for a texture image to be used by other components.
